body:
Hi there,
Last week, we told Senator Jeanne Shaheen that we'd help her raise $10,000 for her reelection campaign.
That number wasn't arbitrary. We set a $10,000 goal because polls show Jeanne locked in a statistical tie with a far-right Republican, and CNBC is reporting that she is one of the two most vulnerable Democratic Senators in the country. **Losing in New Hampshire would mean handing the GOP Senate control for another two years, plain and simple.**
Unfortunately we came up a little short. **[Nothing too dramatic but with the future of the Senate and the Supreme Court on the line, we really need to make up ground. subject: Resolute Reads
body:
"China is up to its old tricks on trade, but it’s learning the hard way that there’s a new sheriff in town: President Trump." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b0c1d32e6a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [Trump is Just Fighting Back in a Trade War that China Started Long Ago](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=83015ac9f6&e=3ee4985eea)
-_New York Post_
“China is up to its old tricks on trade, but it’s learning the hard way that there’s a new sheriff in town: President Trump,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes. “China has operated in bad faith not only in negotiations, but in its actual trade policies, time and again breaking promises to stop stealing intellectual property and trade secrets. Let’s be honest: It was Beijing that started this war. Yet until Trump, America declined to fight back.”

**🎬****Vice President Pence:** [USMCA levels playing field for American workers](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a2521ca65b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Constitutional Crisis As Absurdist Theater](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d864522fd9&e=3ee4985eea)
-_National Review_
“Jerry Nadler has declared a constitutional crisis. The proximate cause is a couple of redacted lines, including one footnote, in a 400-page report. Let’s be glad for the sake of the republic that an entire page wasn’t withheld,” the _National Review_ editorial board writes. “Nothing in the regulations required Attorney General Bill Barr to release any of the report, let alone release it in its entirety. He did anyway. . .”
---
|
---
| [Mueller Cleared Trump — Now Get Over It](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b3e30c9633&e=3ee4985eea)
-_New York Post_
“It’s now been more than six weeks since special counsel Bob Mueller, the former FBI director, concluded his investigation into Russia’s interference in our 2016 election . . . It’s finally over,” Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell (R-KY) writes. “For two years, the Democratic Party held out hope that the legal system would undo their loss in 2016. They refused to make peace with the American people’s choice. But the American people elected this president. They did. The American people voted for change.”
---
|
---
| [Trump’s Tariff Tactic is the Best Way to Finally Make China Stop Cheating](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c7ffd90211&e=3ee4985eea)
-_New York Post_
“The president held off raising tariffs on Chinese-made goods to 25 percent on March 1, as he had promised. The hope was that China, after decades of cheating on trade in every way imaginable, would finally agree to play by the rules,” Steven Mosher writes. “Then, [last] Friday, China attempted to rewrite a whole host of provisions it had previously agreed to.”
---
|
---
| [By Voting to Hold Barr in Contempt, Dems Defy Logic and Precedent](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ef66685b0e&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“You can’t help but notice the phrase ‘Russian collusion’ has vanished from Democratic talking points and left a void in their narrative,” Rep. Doug Collins (R-GA), the top Republican lawmaker on the House Judiciary Committee, writes. “So Democrats have resolved to neutralize Barr by attacking his integrity . . . What a cynical, mean-spirited, counterproductive and irresponsible step it is.”
---
|
---
| [Border Crisis Worsens: 100,000 Border Crossers Arrested in April, Highest Since 2007](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=881b1bfd35&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“Nearly 100,000 people were taken into custody along the southern border in April after illegally crossing from Mexico into the United States, marking the highest number in one month since April 2007, according to new federal data,” Anna Giaritelli reports.

**🎬****Border Patrol Chief to Congress:** [“We need more than words.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=24fd3426f2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Melania Trump Announces Expansion of Her ‘Be Best’ Initiative with Focus on Child Welfare and Drug Abuse](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=883b49165f&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“First Lady Melania Trump marked the anniversary of her ‘Be Best’ campaign on Tuesday by announcing the expansion of the initiative and another international trip,” Andrew O’Reilly reports. The First Lady’s signature initiative “will now include children of all ages, not just babies born dependent on opioids and other addictive substances, and young mothers. The social media pillar will broaden to add online safety to the emphasis on bullying and good citizenship online.”
---
|
---
| [Tiger Woods Receives Presidential Medal of Freedom in White House Ceremony](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3be191f01f&e=3ee4985eea)
-CBS News
“President Trump honored Tiger Woods for his momentous golf career by awarding him the Presidential Medal of Freedom, the nation's highest civilian honor, at the White House on Monday,” CBS News reports. “The age of Tiger gave us moments that will live forever in sporting lore,” the President said as he stood next to Woods in the Rose Garden.

**🎬****Watch:** [President Trump presents the Medal of Freedom to Tiger Woods](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=accc238b26&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=72373d08af&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0af5fc2fd6&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=fcaaa1c10b)
---

subject: 1,225 people in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
It'd be faster to scoop up a bunch of checks at one event in one city. But we can only make big, structural change in our economy, our government, and our democracy if we build a movement across the c | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852f9b2/45c30650/8734e45c/66969c9a/4203654650/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
Here's a number that caught our attention:

Joe Biden raised **$750,000** from wealthy donors at just one private fundraising event this week.

We were curious, so we calculated how many contributions we'd need across the country to match that huge haul, and in Pennsylvania, that shakes out to 1,225 people.

**[Can you be one of the 1,225 today? Make a contribution right now to help power our grassroots campaign with grassroots donors-- not with events where you can only buy your way in.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852f9b2/45c30650/8734e45c/66969c9d/4203654650/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTExZW0xLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190511em1-full")**

Yes -- it'd be faster to scoop up a bunch of checks at one event in one city.

But we can only make big, structural change in our economy, our government, and our democracy if we build a movement across the country -- one powered by the people, not the wealthy.

Elizabeth doesn't host any exclusive fundraisers like that -- where you can only get in and meet her if you can write a big check -- because her time is not for sale.

Instead, she's traveling across the country helping to build our movement and talking one-on-one with grassroots volunteers and grassroots donors who chip in just a few bucks at a time.

Just look at her weekend plans: Instead of heading to a private fundraiser, Elizabeth's on a trip to meet with people in West Virginia and Ohio to hear what's on their mind and to talk about our new plan to end the opioid crisis.

Face to face, person to person, plan after plan, that's how our campaign will win.

**So we have to ask. Can you be one of the 1,225 we need from Pennsylvania to match Joe Biden 's private fundraising haul? It'll help power this campaign and grow our movement the right way:**

**[https://my.elizabethwarren.com/may-fundraising](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852f9b2/45c30650/8734e45c/66969c9c/4203654650/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiMjAxOTA1MTFlbTEtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/may-fundraising?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190511em1-full")**

Thanks,

Team Warren

Just look at her weekend plans: Instead of heading to a private fundraiser, Elizabeth's on a trip to meet with people in West Virginia and Ohio to hear what's on their mind and to talk about our new plan to end the opioid crisis. Face to face, person to person, plan after plan, that's how our campaign will win. So we have to ask. Can you be one of the 1,225 we need from Pennsylvania to match Joe Biden 's private fundraising haul? It'll help power this campaign and grow our movement the right way: "" Thanks, Team Warren | "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02116

body:

| | I'll get to the point: [**I 'm asking for $19 so you can help me be the deciding vote that takes McConnell out of power and puts our country back on track.**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb826e6/232dfd1/91d9eda/62a15487/4157211881/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190511_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on") Mitch McConnell recently threatened to be a "grim reaper" for Democrats. Even if we take back the White House in 2020, he'll block every single progressive, constructive proposal from ever reaching his Senate floor for a vote. That's why we have no choice but to win my Senate race and put Democrats in charge of all three chambers.

This year alone, McConnell has blocked:

\-- Democrats' amendment to the disaster relief bill that would have provided funding for Puerto Rico to recover from hurricane damage.

\-- An election reform bill passed by the Democratic House that would allow for automatic voter registration, longer early voting periods, and independent redistricting to tackle gerrymandering.

_(McConnell said ending gerrymandering to make elections fairer was a Democratic power grab. Think about that: he doesn 't want a fair contest because he can only win if it's a rigged one.)_

\-- New net neutrality laws that would restore Obama-era protections of a free and open internet.
**Imagine the progress Mitch McConnell would singlehandedly stall if we don 't take back the Senate for Democrats in 2020.** I want to be the deciding vote in the Senate that brings our country forward and passes bold, progressive reforms Americans and Coloradans want. But I need your help to get there. Can you pitch in $19 today to help my campaign stand up to Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump?

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Delta Airlines
body:
This is a disgrace.
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1322%2E150750%2Ew_d8QY)

**Delta Airlines is worth billions of dollars. But it’s actively fighting its employees who want to join a union and negotiate for better wages, telling them to buy video games instead.

Join Bernie Sanders and tell Delta to stop trying to undercut workers' right to form a union and negotiate for better wages.
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_delta_union/?source=em190511-1-30&t=2&akid=1322%2E150750%2Ew_d8QY)
**
Sisters, Brothers, and Friends:
Delta Airlines is a multi-billion dollar company whose CEO made nearly $22 million in 2017.
Yet the company’s ramp agents — like the people who you see out of the plane window helping load and unload airplanes — make as little as $9 an hour.
Nine dollars an hour is not a livable wage. It makes sense that Delta employees have decided to join together to form a union, so they can bargain together for better wages, benefits, and working conditions.
Well, Delta doesn’t like that. **In fact, they told their employees to buy video games instead of forming a union. Really.** This is their poster:
[ ](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_delta_union/?source=em190511-1-30&t=3&akid=1322%2E150750%2Ew_d8QY)
What a disgrace. A company that can pay its CEO nearly $22 million can certainly afford to treat its workers better.
Bernie Sanders is standing with Delta workers who want to exercise their right to form a union. Will you join him in calling on Delta to stop trying to undercut workers' right to form a union and negotiate for better wages?
[**Add your name to join Bernie Sanders and tell Delta to let its workers form a union and negotiate for better wages.](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_delta_union/?source=em190511-1-30&t=4&akid=1322%2E150750%2Ew_d8QY)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_delta_union/?source=em190511-1-30&t=5&akid=1322%2E150750%2Ew_d8QY)
When Bernie talks about the need to rebuild the American labor movement and to make it easier, not harder, to join a union, he means it. And we mean it on our campaign, too.
Bernie 2020 is the first-ever major presidential campaign to negotiate a contract with its workers’ union. We’re proud of that fact, and we hope other campaigns follow suit.
The right to organize as part of a union has historically been one of the surest ways for American workers to join the middle class.
There are many reasons for the growing inequality in our economy, but perhaps the most significant reason for the disappearing middle class is that the rights of workers to join together and collectively bargain for better wages, benefits, and working conditions have been severely undermined.
That is why it is such a disgrace for Delta to make its CEO a multi-millionaire while actively fighting its employees’ rights to form and join a union and to negotiate for better wages. Telling its employees to buy video games instead of joining a union is insulting to the workers, and to the idea that people should be able to make a living wage in this country.
Will you call on Delta to let its workers form a union and negotiate for better wages?
[**Sign Bernie’s petition to Delta Airlines.](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_delta_union/?source=em190511-1-30&t=6&akid=1322%2E150750%2Ew_d8QY)**
Thank you for standing up for working people.
In solidarity,
Faiz Shakir
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_delta_union/?source=em190511-1-30&t=7&akid=1322%2E150750%2Ew_d8QY)
Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=8&akid=1322%2E150750%2Ew_d8QY). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=9&akid=1322%2E150750%2Ew_d8QY). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=10&refcode2=1322_150750_w_d8QY&akid=1322%2E150750%2Ew_d8QY).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=11&akid=1322%2E150750%2Ew_d8QY).

Bill Lee's school vouchers bill in the state House, NewsChannel 5 Investigates has learned."_ \-- _WTVF_ (Nashville)
